revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Year by category |m=2 |c=0 |d=0 |y=5 |cat=Webアニメ |parent=各年のWebアニメ |sortkey=うえふあにめ |subcat=2005年のアニメ }} [[2005年]]に配信が開始された[[Webアニメ]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:2005年のWeb動画|あにめ]]」

[[Category:2005年のWeb動画|あにめ]]

==English Content== {{Portal|Anime and manga|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title year}} }} }} This [[Help:Category|category]] is for [[anime]] [[original net animation]] (ONA) films and series released in the year '''[[{{Title year}}]]'''. {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}}
[[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[en:Category:2005 anime ONAs]] [[en:Category:2005 anime ONAs]] [[ja:Category:2005年のWebアニメ]] [[ja:Category:2005年のWebアニメ]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Cofun Gal no Coffy]] [[zh:Category:2005年日本網路動畫]] [[zh:Category:Category:2005年日本網路動畫]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
